scope: Purpose-limited historical reference for Stride 2B.2 identifier interpretation adaptation only.

files.notes: Exact historical utility-module bytes. Authorized only as reference for adapting sanitizeItemId and extractItemId semantics into a new isolated pure module for Stride 2B.2. Do not copy unrelated cache or image-format utilities, add navigation, or infer persistence behavior.

validation.officialRepositoryLocalNodeValidator: NOT_RUN in packet-creation environment; AI Studio must run node scripts/validate-source-packet.cjs after download and extraction.

limitations: This packet authorizes reference and adaptation of sanitizeItemId and extractItemId semantics only.
The active scan3 implementation must be a new isolated pure module; the historical utils.ts file must not be copied wholesale.
Navigation, item lookup, Firebase, Firestore, authentication, persistence, migration, NFC, and scanner lifecycle changes remain excluded.
The historical algorithm may produce an empty normalized identifier; the implementation must expose this result explicitly and must not invent fallback semantics without an owner decision.
